evals.prompt: Let's process the next item in the Emmy Knowledge Ingestion Queue together.
evals.expected_behavior: Read the queue, select one needs-review entry, present a compact review packet, and ask whether it is true enough to ingest.

evals.prompt: Curate the queue entry about iv-cbv-payroll payroll aggregator integration model.
evals.expected_behavior: Review the named queue entry with the human and avoid Confluence writes until final approval.

evals.prompt: I reviewed this queue item and it is accurate. Promote it into the proposed canonical page.
evals.expected_behavior: Draft the canonical update, confirm final approval, then apply write-safety checks before updating canonical and queue pages.

evals.prompt: I don't know whether this queue item is true. Someone else needs to weigh in.
evals.expected_behavior: Stop processing the entry without Confluence writes and explain that teammate discussion is a future workflow.

evals.prompt: This knowledge queue item needs discussion before we promote it.
evals.expected_behavior: Pause the entry without writing future collaboration statuses or artifacts.

evals.prompt: Ingest this local PDF into the Emmy knowledge store.
evals.expected_behavior: Use the emmy-artifact-ingest workflow because this creates source records and queue entries.

evals.prompt: Search the Emmy knowledge store for current ATO notes.
evals.expected_behavior: Use the ambient emmy-knowledge-store lookup workflow, not queue curation.

evals.prompt: Review this pull request for bugs.
evals.expected_behavior: Do a normal code review unless the user asks to process knowledge-store queue entries.
